DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF GCFS'S MOTION TO HAVE FACTS AND DOCUMENTS DEEMED ADMITTED AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. THE NOTICE WAS INSUFFICIENT PER C.C.P. SECTIONS 1005 AND 1013. THE MOTION MUST BE FILED AND SERVED 16 COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING, PLUS 5 DAYS AS THE MOTION WAS SERVED BY MAIL. THE FIRST DAY THIS MOTION COULD HAVE BEEN HEARD IS FEBRUARY 8, 2010. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion For Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Atty Fees
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GCFS INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION Notice And Motion For Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Atty Fees - off calendar at the request of moving party. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion For Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff GCFS's Motion To Have Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion must be filed and served 16 court days prior to the hearing, plus 5 days as the motion was served by mail. The first day this motion could have been heard is February 8, 2010. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Set For Trial On Apr-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
